extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA attacked in select group on final Category 1 climb, won photo sprint over QUINTANA and HIGUITA on gravel summit finish
tactical_patterns: O'CONNOR forced to chase UAE breakaway himself when team missed move, exposed his weakness defending leader's jersey
INEOS deployed SIVAKOV, KWIATKOWSKI, PORTE grinding pace to isolate rivals before CARAPAZ attack 2.7km out
HIGUITA marked CARAPAZ wheel immediately when he attacked, proving Colombian climbing form peaking mid-stage race
Gravel summit finish rewarded aggressive descending over caution; QUINTANA lost sprint being too fearful leaning into corners
QUINTANA tied on time with ALMEIDA but took overall lead via intermediate sprint points countback tiebreaker

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: won from select group and took young riders jersey, showing stage race resilience after surviving attrition
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: leads overall on countback despite losing sprint, conserved energy never pulling in final selection
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: marked CARAPAZ attack instantly and podiumed, Colombian championship form translating to stage race climbing
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: lost leader's jersey defending alone when UAE got breakaway, lacks team support in mountain defense
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: attacked 2.7km out with INEOS leadout but couldn't sustain, unclear if positioning or form issue
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: dropped early described as clearly off color, health issues limiting performance
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: young rider's jersey lost, couldn't follow final selection despite being protected earlier
rider_signals.JOHANNESSEN Tobias Halland: positive: finished in CARAPAZ group behind winner, strong climbing for young rider in stage race
